changes.action: Removed REVIEW_PRINCIPLES_REQUIRED_SCHEMA, DEFAULT_REVIEW_PRINCIPLES, _review_principles_cfg(). Renamed _get_karpathy_checklist_level() to _get_operating_principles_level() with backward-compat fallback. Updated _validate_workflow_config() to validate operatingPrinciples (accept karpathyChecklist fallback), removed reviewPrinciples validation. Rewrote _validate_ci_verification() to validate securityFindings/performanceFindings/patternCompliance for schemaVersion>=3, accept old schema silently. Updated _validate_features() and validate_repo() signatures.
Added Operating Principles reminder (step 1b) after task start announcement in Step 3
